positive: A stylized, symmetrical mandala design featuring intertwined cosmic elements: crescent moons, nebula clouds, geometric celestial bodies, and delicate filigree constellations. The style is a vibrant blend of Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock printing and Art Deco symmetry. Use a limited, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, luminous gold leaf accents, emerald green, and midnight blue. The composition must be centrally focused, forming a clean, distinct silhouette suitable for apparel printing. The rendering should emphasize crisp lines, deep shadow play, and a clean, graphic feel, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, noisy, low quality, watermark, text, signature, logo, out of focus, artifacts, grainy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, asymmetrical, solid color background, excessive detail clutter
